title: Thuishaven Pattern Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of every pattern file in patterns/

id.description: Unique pattern identifier, kebab-case, must match the filename without .md

title.description: Human-readable title describing the use case, not the app

version.description: Pattern version, bumped on breaking changes to the recipe

category.description: Exactly one category from the allowed set

tags.description: Free-form lowercase tags used for search and filtering

maintainer.description: GitHub username of the person maintaining this pattern

problem.description: Short description of the problem this pattern solves

app_source.description: URL of the application's source repository or homepage

alternatives.description: Alternatives that were considered and why they were not chosen

prerequisites.description: What the user needs before starting, as kebab-case identifiers

estimated_time_minutes.description: Estimated time to follow this pattern from scratch, in minutes

gotchas.description: Short list of things that commonly go wrong

tested_against.description: What this pattern was last validated against, so staleness is detectable

app_version.description: Version of the recommended app the steps were verified against

verified.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the pattern was last verified end-to-end

upstream_docs.description: URL of the upstream documentation checked during verification

inputs.description: Typed parameters the user (or agent) supplies before following the pattern. Separates the recipe from the deployment-specific values; referenced as ${NAME} in steps and assertions.

name.description: ENV-style identifier, referenced as ${NAME} in steps and assertions

description.description: What this value is and, if user-supplied, what to ask for

default.description: Value applied when the user supplies none

required.description: Whether the user must supply a value (default true)

secret.description: Whether the value is sensitive and must not be echoed or logged (default false)

generate.description: Shell command that produces the value instead of asking the user, e.g. 'openssl rand -hex 32'

format.description: Value-shape hint for prompting and validation

assertions.description: Machine-checkable post-conditions: the executable form of the Verification section. The agent runs each check (or performs each manual step) and reports pass/fail.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for the assertion

description.description: What is being asserted, in plain language

check.description: Shell command that exits 0 exactly when the assertion holds; may reference ${INPUT} values. Mutually exclusive with manual.

manual.description: True when the assertion can only be verified by a human (GUI/visual). Mutually exclusive with check.

related.description: IDs of related patterns the user might want next
